name: config-sync reports a tool with no projectable option surface as needs_mapping rather than dropping it silently
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/config-sync.sh" --rule-id r-x --enforced-by "faketool-xyz" 2>e.txt; grep -q 'config-sync rule=r-x tools=1 options=0 needs_mapping=1' e.txt && echo needs-mapping-surfaced 1>&2
